overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic city during golden hour. The camera follows the character as they navigate past a massive megastructure, cross streets, and walk along palm-lined sidewalks with elevated train tracks overhead.

events.description: camera starts looking up at white office building then pans down to street level
begins walking forward along the sidewalk toward the megastructure

agents.ego_description: walking along city street approaching a large futuristic megastructure

entered.detail: tall white building with grid windows and multiple floors
massive futuristic building with overhanging sections and red warning lights
tall palm tree trunk in foreground
large digital advertisement on building rooftop

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a view looking up at a white office building before panning down to street level. The character begins walking along a concrete sidewalk toward a massive cyberpunk megastructure in the distance, with palm trees and digital billboards visible in the warm golden hour light.

events.description: moves from sidewalk into open intersection area at base of megastructure
turns right and crosses the street toward the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and turning onto the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: traffic signal with red lights mounted on pole
curved elevated roadway structure with concrete supports

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a wide open intersection at the base of the megastructure, which now looms large on the left. After crossing the street and passing a traffic light, the white office building disappears behind as the character turns onto a new sidewalk.

events.description: two female pedestrians appear walking ahead on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along palm-lined sidewalk approaching two female pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman with red hair and white top walking ahead
woman with blonde hair walking alongside the red-haired woman

entered.detail: line of palm trees along the sidewalk edge
large billboard with blue 24/7 STORE text
metal elevated transit structure spanning across the street
piles of garbage bags and debris accumulated on sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a palm-lined commercial sidewalk, the character passes parked cars and trash piles while approaching two women walking ahead. A large 24/7 STORE billboard and elevated train tracks become visible in the distance as the megastructure fades behind.

events.description: walks underneath the elevated train tracks entering partial shade
passes under a large yellow food cart umbrella temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: following the two women under the elevated train tracks past street vendors

notable_agents.action: red-haired woman walking under the overpass ahead
vendor sitting at yellow food cart under the tracks

entered.detail: food vendor cart with large yellow umbrella and neon lighting
thick metal support columns for the elevated tracks
futuristic buildings with neon signs visible past the tracks

segments.scene_description: The character follows the two women under the elevated train tracks, entering a semi-covered area with mixed lighting. They pass a yellow food cart with a vendor on the right, while metal support pillars line the path. The tracks now loom directly overhead as the open palm tree street fades behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open, sun-drenched streets of a futuristic city into the shadowed underbelly of an elevated transit system. It begins with a downward pan from a white office building to a concrete sidewalk, where the character walks toward a massive cyberpunk megastructure bathed in warm golden hour light. As the character crosses a wide intersection, the megastructure looms large on the left before the scene shifts toward a palm-lined commercial strip filled with parked cars and digital billboards. The camera then follows two women walking ahead, moving past a 24/7 store sign as the open street gradually gives way to the structure of the city. Finally, the environment transitions into a semi-covered area with mixed lighting, passing a yellow food cart and metal support pillars as the elevated train tracks come to loom directly overhead.
